text.title: gemini-multimodal Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gemini-multimodal as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: File upload is not idempotent — uploading the same file twice creates two separate file objects; cache file names to avoid duplicate uploads
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-uploading wastes storage quota and creates orphaned file objects that consume space until expiry.

failure-mode.description: The polling loop must have a max-iteration guard — a stuck "PROCESSING" state will loop forever without it
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Video processing can hang indefinitely for corrupted or unsupported files; without a guard, the agent stalls indefinitely.

failure-mode.description: model.generate_content() is synchronous; for concurrent agent workers, use asyncio with aiohttp or the async Vertex SDK
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blocking calls prevent parallel processing; async patterns are necessary for high-throughput pipelines.

failure-mode.description: Context cache requires a minimum of 32K tokens — if your document is smaller, caching raises an error; check token count before creating
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Attempting to cache small documents wastes a round-trip and surfaces an API error; check first.

failure-mode.description: Gemini's 2M context window tempts agents to stuff everything in one call — but cost is linear with tokens; use retrieval for large corpora
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shoving all documents into one call maximizes latency and cost; chunking + retrieval is more efficient.

failure-mode.description: Code execution results may be truncated for long-running computations; the sandbox has execution time limits (~30s)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long-running code fails silently with truncated output; break into smaller chunks or use external compute.

failure-mode.description: Vertex AI auth uses Application Default Credentials (gcloud auth application-default login) — different from GOOGLE_API_KEY used by the Gemini Developer API
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mixing auth methods causes silent 403 errors; keep them separate per environment.
